mapper.sql: select column_id, table_id, column_name, column_comment, column_type, java_type, java_field, is_pk, is_increment, is_required, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, html_type, dict_type, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gen_table_column
mapper.select: select cols.column_name, (case when (cols.is_nullable = 'NO' and pk.column_name is null) then '1' else '0' end) as is_required, (case when pk.column_name is not null then '1' else '0' end) as is_pk, cols.ordinal_position as sort, coalesce(pg_catalog.col_description(cls.oid, cols.ordinal_position), '') as column_comment, (case when cols.is_identity = 'YES' or cols.column_default like 'nextval(%' then '1' else '0' end) as is_increment, (case when cols.data_type = 'character varying' then concat('varchar(', cols.character_maximum_length, ')') when cols.data_type = 'character' then concat('char(', cols.character_maximum_length, ')') when cols.data_type = 'numeric' and cols.numeric_precision is not null and cols.numeric_scale is not null then concat('numeric(', cols.numeric_precision, ',', cols.numeric_scale, ')') when cols.data_type = 'numeric' and cols.numeric_precision is not null then concat('numeric(', cols.numeric_precision, ')') when cols.data_type = 'timestamp without time zone' then 'timestamp' when cols.data_type = 'timestamp with time zone' then 'timestamptz' when cols.data_type = 'USER-DEFINED' then cols.udt_name else cols.data_type end) as column_type from information_schema.columns cols join pg_class cls on cls.relname = cols.table_name join pg_namespace n on n.oid = cls.relnamespace and n.nspname = cols.table_schema left join ( select kcu.table_schema, kcu.table_name, kcu.column_name from information_schema.table_constraints tc join information_schema.key_column_usage kcu on tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name and tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema and tc.table_name = kcu.table_name where tc.constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY' ) pk on pk.table_schema = cols.table_schema and pk.table_name = cols.table_name and pk.column_name = cols.column_name where cols.table_schema = current_schema() and cols.table_name = #{tableName} order by cols.ordinal_position
mapper.insert: insert into gen_table_column ( table_id, column_name, column_comment, column_type, java_type, java_field, is_pk, is_increment, is_required, is_insert, is_edit, is_list, is_query, query_type, html_type, dict_type, sort, create_by, create_time )values( #{tableId}, #{columnName}, #{columnComment}, #{columnType}, #{javaType}, #{javaField}, #{isPk}, #{isIncrement}, #{isRequired}, #{isInsert}, #{isEdit}, #{isList}, #{isQuery}, #{queryType}, #{htmlType}, #{dictType}, #{sort}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.delete:
delete from gen_table_column where table_id in
#{tableId}

delete from gen_table_column where column_id in
#{item.columnId}
